corrections.correct: καὶ ἐγὼ ἤκουσα περὶ σοῦ ὅτι δύνασαι B θησαν ἀναγγεῖλαί μοι.
corrections.note: A whole phrase at the start of v.16 is omitted before θησαν; the trailing B siglum belongs to the apparatus marker in the margin/line, not body text.
Printed form clearly has ν and accent: κατηνέχθη.
The lemma begins στι], not στη].
The printed lemma has accented ἧς.
The siglum is B with superscript ab, not plain Bb.

corrections.location: v.20 note on απο του θρονου της βασιλειας
corrections.current: απο της β. αυτου και απο του θρ. αυτου Q
corrections.correct: απο της β. αυτου και απο του θρ. αυτου Q |
corrections.note: A separator bar follows Q before the next note.

corrections.current: εξεδιωχθη απο των ανθρ] η κατοικεια A
corrections.correct: ἐξεδιώχθη ἀπο των ανθρ] η καρδια A
corrections.note: The variant reads η καρδια A, not η κατοικεια A.

corrections.correct: ηνεγκας] ηγκεας B* (-γκας B* fort A)
corrections.note: The variant is ηγκεας, not ηγκεαν.

notes: Running head matches. Body omission at the top of the page is the main issue. Final body line is cut off on this scan/transcription and not reviewed beyond visible text. Apparatus otherwise largely matches, including page number 539 at foot.
